work.title: Software Engineer

Created architecture diagrams that facilitated scalable and maintainable software solutions

Connected with Project Managers and Site Champions to plan out timelines for high priority features

work.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Enforcing TDD using Clean Architecture for maintainable and testable code
Constructing and executing state-based database development in Microsoft SQL Server
Implementing UI designs using React.js and REST API's in Node.js
Architecting resources and services in Microsoft Azure using Terraform
Collaborating with a team to guarantee continuous integration and deployment

work.title: Software Engineer Intern
descriptions: Improved unit test coverage on multiple vital microservices by 20+%
Contributed to C# microservices designed around business domains, emphasizing clean architecture and scalable design

work.title: Software Developer Intern
descriptions: Implemented UI for our endpoint management process flow in Vue.js
Handled third party webhooks to ingest data using Python and Celery

projects.name: Astrorpheus
description: Designed and implemented 3D point cloud viewer using React Three Fiber
Retrieved and served 3D point cloud models and audio files from S3

projects.name: GymArc
